title: dioscorea tenuiphyllum
intro: Dioscorea tenuiphyllum, also known as Chinese yam or mountain yam, is a type of perennial vine native to the mountainous regions of China, with thick, edible tubers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea tenuiphyllum include reducing blood sugar levels, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the tubers are often dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
